text: The tenant shall pay rent of ₹15,000 on or before 5th of each month.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard rent payment clause with a clear due date.

text: कामकाज में गलती होने पर कर्मचारी अपने खर्चे पर सम्मानित की जा सकती है।
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Unilateral penalty clause for errors without clear fairness.

text: The property will be transferred to the buyer only after full payment in cash.
label: RISKY
reason: Encourages black money transactions—illegal under FEMA.

text: The borrower shall sign a blank cheque in the name of the lender.
label: RISKY
reason: Signing a blank cheque is unethical and risky.

text: किरायेदार मकान की मरम्मत के लिए जिम्मेदार होगा, भले ही नुकसान मालिक का गलती हो।
label: RISKY
reason: Tenant held liable for all repairs — unfair and likely illegal.

text: बेईमानता या गलत सूचना देने पर, उधारकर्ता ऋण राशि की दोगुनी राशि देगा।
label: RISKY
reason: Penalty of double the loan amount is exploitative and likely unenforceable.

text: अधिकारी पासपोर्ट या अन्य दस्तावेजों की छाप नहीं लेंगे।
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard clause stating documents will not be stamped or certified.

text: The property shall be transferred only if the buyer pays all taxes and fees. No exceptions allowed.
label: STANDARD
reason: Fair and expected condition in property deals.

text: The employee must report all personal income to the employer for deduction purposes.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Overreach into employee's personal finances.

text: The tenant must vacate the property within 24 hours upon demand by the landlord.
label: RISKY
reason: Immediate eviction without reasonable notice is illegal.

text: Access to common areas (Society club, lifts) may be restricted for non-payment of dues.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard penalty for non-payment in societies.

text: The borrower shall repay the loan amount of ₹2,00,000 within 24 months with 10% annual interest.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard loan repayment terms with reasonable interest.

text: किसी भी नुकसान के लिए कंपनी कोई जिम्मेदारी नहीं लेगी।
label: RISKY
reason: Exculpatory clause may be illegal in certain contexts.

text: कंपनी कर्मचारी के नोटबुक्स या डायरी को किसी भी समय नोटिस के बिना जांच सकती है।
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Intrusive surveillance clause without prior notice.

text: The employee may be dismissed without notice for any reason.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Employment-at-will clause is uncommon in India.

text: The employer reserves the right to deduct salary for any damage to office property.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: One-sided clause shifting liability to the employee.

text: The employee shall receive a salary of ₹45,000 per month, revised annually based on performance.
label: STANDARD
reason: Fair salary clause with annual revision terms.

text: The borrower shall repay the loan in 24 monthly installments with 12% interest per annum.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard loan repayment terms with reasonable interest.

text: The employee must surrender their passport to the employer upon joining.
label: RISKY
reason: Unlawful retention of employee's passport is exploitative.

text: The borrower shall repay the loan in equal monthly installments of ₹20,000 over 36 months.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard amortization schedule with reasonable terms.

text: The loan must be repaid within 36 months. Any prepayment will incur a 10% penalty.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Prepayment penalty is uncommon but not illegal.

text: दस्तावेज में किसी त्रुटि के लिए प्रकाशक के निर्दोष होंगे।
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard disclaimer protecting the publisher from errors in documents.

text: किरायेदार के पेट मालिक की अनुमति से ही पालतू जानवर रख सकता है।
label: STANDARD
reason: Common clause requiring landlord permission for pets.

text: The borrower shall repay the loan amount of ₹5,00,000 within 36 months with 12% annual interest.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard loan repayment terms with clear interest rate.

text: नौकरी छोड़ने पर सभी कंपनी के संपत्ति को 15 दिन के भीतर वापस करना होगा।
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard company property return clause.

text: The landlord shall provide 30 days’ notice before increasing the rent by more than 10%.
label: STANDARD
reason: Reasonable rent increase clause with prior notice.

text: कराएदार खर्चों को उनके खाते में से काट लिया जाएगा।
label: RISKY
reason: Unilateral deduction from tenant’s account without consent.

text: The landlord may enter the property at any time without prior notice.
label: RISKY
reason: Violates tenant privacy rights under rent control laws.

text: किरायेदार को 6 महीने की सूटकेस देनी होगी और फिर भी मालिक 30 दिनों में खाली करा सकता है।
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Short notice period after initial rent deposit.

text: किरायेदार सभी मरम्मत खर्चे अपने हिस्से से popularity करेगा.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Tenant is responsible for all maintenance costs, which is uncommon.

text: The seller warrants that the property has no legal encumbrances or disputes at the time of sale.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard legal warranty in property transactions.

text: बैंक बिना कारण के ऋण की शर्तें बदल सकता है।
label: RISKY
reason: Bank can arbitrarily change terms, which is unfair and possibly illegal.

text: The property shall be transferred only after full payment, including all hidden charges.
label: STANDARD
reason: Fair and transparent condition for property transfer.

text: The borrower agrees to pay all legal fees if the loan is disputed.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: One-sided cost burden on the borrower.

text: The tenant shall maintain the property in good condition and repair any damage caused.
label: STANDARD
reason: Fair expectation for property maintenance.

text: The employee must provide 60 days' notice before resignation, failing which salary will be forfeited.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Long notice period with severe penalty is one-sided.

text: दस्तावेज़ की सभी शर्तें हिन्दी Sprache में मान्य होंगी।
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard language provision in Hindi documents.

text: कंपनी के किसी भी समय कर्मचारी की नौकरी समाप्त कर सकती है बिना औपचारिकता।
label: RISKY
reason: No notice period or due process for termination.

text: The borrower shall pay a penalty of 2% per month on late loan payments.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard late payment penalty clause in loan agreements.

text: The employer reserves the right to deduct salary for any perceived negligence.
label: RISKY
reason: Arbitrary salary deductions are exploitative and illegal.

text: The seller shall not be responsible for any hidden property defects after sale.
label: RISKY
reason: Unfairly shifts liability to the buyer—contravenes consumer rights.

text: किसी भी विवाद की स्थिति में केवल मोहल्ला पंचायत का ही निर्णय मान्य होगा।
label: RISKY
reason: Excludes legal recourse, potentially illegal.

text: The employee must reimburse the company for training costs if they leave within 2 years.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Uncommon but legally enforceable in some cases.

text: किरायेदार हर साल पेंट और रिपेयर के लिए ₹5,000 देंगे।
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Fixed annual maintenance charge is uncommon in rent agreements.

text: The property shall be transferred in favour of the buyer upon full payment as per the terms of this deed.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard transfer condition in property deeds.

text: The employee shall be provided with health insurance after completion of the probation period.
label: STANDARD
reason: Fair employer-provided benefit with reasonable condition.

text: The tenant is responsible for all maintenance costs, including major repairs.
label: RISKY
reason: Shifts landlord's legal obligations to tenant.

text: All disputes shall be resolved through arbitration in Mumbai.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard arbitration clause specifying dispute resolution.

text: The lender may charge a penalty of up to 2% per month for delayed payments.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Penalty rate is higher than standard market rates.

text: The employee shall be liable for all legal disputes arising from their work.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Unfairly shifts legal liability to the employee.

text: The borrower agrees that the lender may take possession of any collateral without court order.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Uncommon but not illegal in private loans.

text: बैंक इंटरेस्ट रेट को भरे बिना बढ़ा सकता है।
label: RISKY
reason: Allows bank to raise interest without notice, which is unfair.

text: The employee agrees to mandatory overtime of up to 12 hours on 3 days a week.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Excessive overtime expectation.

text: The landlord can forcibly enter the property at any time without prior notice.
label: RISKY
reason: Violates tenant privacy rights.

text: किरायेदार थर्ड पार्टी को बिना मालिक की अनुमति के मकान patience नहीं कर सकता।
label: STANDARD
reason: Common sublease restriction in rental agreements.

text: द香港य प्रबन्धक सारे नियम बदल सकता है बिना पूव सूचना के।
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Unilateral rule changes by society is one-sided but not illegal.

text: The employer shall not be liable for accidents outside working hours.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Limits employer liability beyond standard worker compensation laws.

text: दस्तखत करने के बाद कोई तरीका छोडने का नहीं है। हर हद तक जिम्मेदार रहना पड़ेगा।
label: RISKY
reason: No termination clause—exploitative contract condition.

text: किरायादार बिना अवकाश के मकान दिखाने के लिए तैयार रहेगा।
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Landlord can show the property without notice, which is inconvenient.

text: The guarantor shall be liable for the full loan amount if the borrower defaults.
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard clause in loan agreements with a guarantor.

text: The property shall be transferred only upon full payment and valid government registration.
label: STANDARD
reason: Required legal condition for property transfer.

text: दोनों पक्ष यथास्थिति पर सहमत हैं और विवाद के लिए कोई कानूनी कार्रवाई नहीं करेंगे।
label: RISKY
reason: Waives legal rights, potentially illegal.

text: ందాంగ్ की बकाया राशि में 2% प्रति माह ब्याज लगेगा।
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard late payment interest clause.

text: अगर खरीदार को फैसला पसंद न आये तो भी संपत्ति का भुगतान पूर्ण करना होगा।
label: RISKY
reason: No recourse for buyer if dissatisfied with the decision.

text: The employee's gratuity shall be forfeited if they resign within 3 years of joining.
label: UNUSUAL
reason: Forfeiture of gratuity is harsh but not legally prohibited.

text: दस्तावेज़ पर स्वीकृति के साथ मकान के हस्तांतरण करेंगे बिना किसी अतिरिक्त दस्तावेज़ की आवश्यकता।
label: STANDARD
reason: Standard deed transfer clause with mutual agreement.

text: The loan shall be secured by the borrower's immovable property in case of default.
label: STANDARD
reason: Common security clause in loan agreements.

text: दा खाता रखने की जिम्मेदारी बिलकुल ही क़रारदातर पर रहेगा।
label: UNUSUAL
reason: One-sided accounting responsibility in contract.

text: कामगार को वार्षिक चिकित्सकीय परीक्षण के लिए 10 दिनों तक अवकाश मिलेगा, बिना वेतन कटौती के।
label: STANDARD
reason: Mandated medical leave under Indian labor laws.

text: अगर बैंक दिया हुआ ऋण वापस नहीं किया गया तो गारंटर का खुद का संपत्ति बेच दी जाएगी।
label: RISKY
reason: Unilateral liquidation of guarantor's personal property without due process.

text: The landlord reserves the right to increase rent by 20% annually without justification.
label: RISKY
reason: Excessive rent hike without cap is exploitative.

text: बिक्री की तारीख के बाद 10% अग्रिम दाम वापस नहीं किए जाएंगे।
label: RISKY
reason: Forfeiture of deposit without valid reason—unfair.
